name: Phase 9: Landing Page Core
description: Verifies that all sections of the landing page render correctly on the home page.

planSteps.description: Assert that the navbar contains the logo text FUD.ai
Assert that the hero section main heading 'Detect FUD before it liquidates you.' is visible
Assert that the Live Demo section is visible on this homepage
Assert that the Footer containing 'Mit' or 'mit' is visible
